steps.t: The blacksmith's forge is in Eaworth, near the Mead Hall. Goldwine asked you to forge spears for the guards of Eaworth.
The guards of Eaworth can be found throughout the city. Goldwine asked you to bring the spears you crafted to the guards of Eaworth.
Goldwine stands guard near the blacksmith's forge in Eaworth. You should let Goldwine know that you have delivered the spears to the guards of Eaworth…
